summary_en: Use these codes for a selection of free Jailbreak goodies.
body_en:
If you're on the hunt for some extra goodies in Jailbreak, you're in the right place. Below, we've assembled all of the latest codes for Roblox's cops and robbers open-world sandbox game, allowing you to redeem everything from cash to YouTuber-themed cosmetics.
Below, you'll find all of the currently active and working Jailbreak codes in June 2026 that you can redeem for free rewards:
The following Jailbreak codes have expired and can no longer be redeemed as of June 2026:
To redeem Jailbreak codes, boot up the game and, once you’re in, follow the steps below:
If your Jailbreak code isn’t working, it’s likely due to one of two scenarios. The first is that the code was inputted incorrectly. Check the spelling and that the case is correct, then redeem again. You can even copy and paste the codes directly from this article over to Roblox if you want to make sure you’re inputting them correctly.
The other possibility is the code has expired or you’ve already used it. In either scenario, the code bar will simply close, indicating that the code hasn't gone through successfully.
If you're looking for new Jailbreak codes, they can be found on developer Badimo's socials and the official Jailbreak Discord server . Although where these codes drop can change, the best spot to check is usually the Announcements channel, where events and other promotions are revealed.
Jailbreak is a cops-and-robbers-themed open world sandbox game, where players can decide to either break free from prison and pull off daring robberies as a criminal or hunt down escapees and bring them to justice as the police. Along the way, they can explore a large open map, causing chaos in cars, robbing trains, and piloting helicopters while battling or teaming up with other players.
Callum Williams is an IGN freelancer covering features and guides. When he's away from his desk, you can usually find him obsessing over the lore of the latest obscure indie horror game or bashing his head against a boss in the newest soulslike. You can catch him over on Twitter at @CaIIumWilliams.
